about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Why Choose JERAI GYM
about.description: Founded in 2009, JERAI GYM has grown into a premier fitness destination. Our state-of-the-art facility spans over 25,000 sq ft, featuring the latest equipment and technology to support every fitness journey.

features.name: State-of-the-Art Equipment
features.description: Over 200+ pieces of premium gym equipment from top brands, regularly maintained and updated.

features.name: Expert Coaching
features.description: Certified trainers with years of experience in personal training, group fitness, and sport-specific programs.

features.name: Flexible Hours
features.description: Open 5 AM to 11 PM daily, with 24/7 access for premium members to fit any schedule.

features.name: Nutrition Planning
features.description: Customized meal plans and nutrition counseling to complement your workout routine.

items.question: What are your operating hours?
items.answer: We are open Monday through Friday from 5 AM to 11 PM, and weekends from 6 AM to 10 PM. Elite members enjoy 24/7 access.

items.question: Do you offer a free trial?
items.answer: Yes! We offer a complimentary 3-day trial pass for all new visitors. Book your free session through our website or visit us in person.

items.question: Can I freeze my membership?
items.answer: Yes, you can freeze your membership for up to 3 months per year with at least 7 days notice. Contact our front desk for details.

items.question: Do you provide personal training?
items.answer: Absolutely! We have certified personal trainers available for one-on-one sessions. Pro members get 2 sessions per month included, and Elite members get unlimited sessions.

items.question: Is there parking available?
items.answer: Yes, we have a large free parking lot for members. We also have secure bike storage for cyclists.

items.question: What should I bring for my first visit?
items.answer: Bring comfortable workout clothes, athletic shoes, a water bottle, and a towel. We provide lockers and shower facilities.

contact.title: Get in Touch
